popularStory.headline: Married Twice
popularStory.description:
Born	1398
Died	1436 (aged 37–38)
Buried	St. Lambert's Church in Oldenburg
Noble family	House of Schauenburg
Spouse(s)	Balthasar of Mecklenburg
Dietrich of Oldenburg
Issue
King Christian I of Denmark
M …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Countess Helvig of Schauenburg於1395年出生在德國史萊斯維-爾斯坦可萊斯 史萊斯維-福倫斯包格史萊斯維時，她的父親Gerhard VI Count of Holstein-Rendsburg28歲，母親Katherina Elisabeth von Braunschweig-Lüneburg28歲。她於1417年4月18日之前與Balthasar Fürst von Wenden結婚。她去世於1436年11月11日在德國尼德薩辛歐登伯格享年41歲，埋葬在德國海因里希_史萊斯維-爾斯坦可萊斯 歐登伯格。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Countess Helvig of Schauenburg于1395年出生在德国史萊斯維-爾斯坦可萊斯 史萊斯維-福倫斯包格史萊斯維时，她的父亲Gerhard VI Count of Holstein-Rendsburg28岁，母亲Katherina Elisabeth von Braunschweig-Lüneburg28岁。她于1417年4月18日之前与Balthasar Fürst von Wenden结婚。她去世于1436年11月11日在德国尼德薩辛歐登伯格享年41岁，埋葬在德国海因里希_史萊斯維-爾斯坦可萊斯 歐登伯格。

nameMeanings.name: Countess
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Nottinghamshire, of Norman origin): from Middle English contas(e), Old French contesse ‘countess’, applied as a nickname for a proud, haughty woman or for a foppish man, or as an occupational name for a servant of a countess.

nameMeanings.name: Helvig
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: equivalent of Hedwig ‘battle strife’ , borne by the young girl who is the central character in Henrik Ibsen's play The Wild Duck ( 1886 ).

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

en.lifeSummary: When Countess Helvig of Schauenburg was born in 1395, in Schleswig, Schleswig-Flensburg, Schleswig-Holstein, Germany, her father, Gerhard VI Count of Holstein-Rendsburg, was 28 and her mother, Katherina Elisabeth von Braunschweig-Lüneburg, was 28. She married Balthasar Fürst von Wenden before 18 April 1417. She died on 11 November 1436, in Oldenburg, Lower Saxony, Germany, at the age of 41, and was buried in Oldenburg, Schleswig-Holstein, Prussia, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Countess Helvig of Schauenburg est née en 1395, à Schleswig, Kreis Schleswig-Flensburg, Schleswig-Holstein, Allemagne, son père, Gerhard VI Count of Holstein-Rendsburg, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Katherina Elisabeth von Braunschweig-Lüneburg, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé Balthasar Fürst von Wenden avant 18 avril 1417. Elle est décédée le 11 novembre 1436, à Oldenburg, Niedersachsen, Allemagne, à l’âge de 41 ans, et a été enterrée à Kreis Oldenburg, Schleswig-Holstein, Prusse, Allemagne.

de.Gottorp, Schleswig, Schleswig-Holstein,P: Schleswig, Kreis Schleswig, Schleswig-Holstein, Preußen, Deutschland
de.lifeSummary: Als Countess Helvig of Schauenburg 1395 in Schleswig, Kreis Schleswig-Flensburg, Schleswig-Holstein, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Gerhard VI Count of Holstein-Rendsburg 28 und ihre Mutter Katherina Elisabeth von Braunschweig-Lüneburg 28. Sie hat vor 18. April 1417 Balthasar Fürst von Wenden geheiratet. Sie starb am 11. November 1436 im Alter von 41 Jahren in Oldenburg, Niedersachsen, Deutschland und wurde in Kreis Oldenburg, Schleswig-Holstein, Preußen, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Countess Helvig of Schauenburg è nata il nel 1395 nel Schleswig, Kreis Schleswig-Flensburg, Schleswig-Holstein, Germania, sua padre, Gerhard VI Count of Holstein-Rendsburg, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Katherina Elisabeth von Braunschweig-Lüneburg, aveva 28 anni. Lei sposato Balthasar Fürst von Wenden prima del 18 aprile 1417. Morì il 11 novembre 1436, nel Oldenburg, Niedersachsen, Germania, all'età di 41 anni, e fu sepolta a Kreis Oldenburg, Schleswig-Holstein, Preußen, Germania.

ko.Gottorp, Schleswig, Schleswig-Holstein,P: 독일 플레우ss 슐레스위그-홀스타인 크레이스 슐레스위그 슐레스위그
ko.lifeSummary: Countess Helvig of Schauenburg(이)가 1395년 독일 슐레스위그-홀스타인 크레이스 슐레스위그-플렌스버그 슐레스위그에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gerhard VI Count of Holstein-Rendsburg(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Katherina Elisabeth von Braunschweig-Lüneburg(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 1417년 4월 18일 이전 Balthasar Fürst von Wenden(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1436년 11월 11일 독일 니더작센 덴버그에서 41세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 플레우ss 슐레스위그-홀스타인 크레이스 덴버그에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Countess Helvig of Schauenburg nasceu em 1395, em Schleswig, Kreis Schleswig-Flensburg, Schleswig-Holstein, Alemanha, seu pai, Gerhard VI Count of Holstein-Rendsburg, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Katherina Elisabeth von Braunschweig-Lüneburg, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com Balthasar Fürst von Wenden antes 18 de abril de 1417. Ela faleceu em 11 de novembro de 1436, em Oldenburg, Niedersachsen, Alemanha, com 41 anos, e foi sepultada em Kreis Oldenburg, Schleswig-Holstein, Preußen, Alemanha.

ru.Gottorp, Schleswig, Schleswig-Holstein,P: щлесвиг, крис щлесвиг, щлесвиг-холстин, Пруссия, Германия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Countess Helvig of Schauenburg родилась в 1395 г. в местности щлесвиг, крис щлесвиг-фленсбург, щлесвиг-холстин, Германия, её отцу по имени Gerhard VI Count of Holstein-Rendsburg было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Katherina Elisabeth von Braunschweig-Lüneburg, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Balthasar Fürst von Wenden перед 18 апрель 1417 г. Она умерла 11 ноября 1436 г. в местности олденбург, ниедирсачсен, Германия в возрасте 41 год и была похоронена в местности крис олденбург, щлесвиг-холстин, Пруссия, Германия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Countess Helvig of Schauenburg nació en 1395, en Schleswig, Kreis Schleswig-Flensburg, Schleswig-Holstein, Alemania, su papá, Gerhard VI Count of Holstein-Rendsburg, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Katherina Elisabeth von Braunschweig-Lüneburg, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Balthasar Fürst von Wenden antes de 18 de abril de 1417. Murió el 11 de noviembre de 1436, en Oldenburg, Niedersachsen, Alemania, a la edad de 41 años, y fue sepultada en Kreis Oldenburg, Schleswig-Holstein, Preußen, Alemania.
